name: Alastair | The Ashworth Family
description:
“Within a week you’ll be wearing my name and my ring on your finger, so show a shred of bloody gratitude instead of parading yourself like some common whore.”

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Your family teeters on the edge of ruin. If not for Alastair Ashworth, you and your parents would be begging in the streets for scraps. He is your salvation, your rescuer, the man who offered you his name and his fortune. So why in God’s name do you keep turning your gaze toward Thomas Whitmore, that pitiful bookworm, instead of your own fiancé?

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿RAMBLE CORNER✿

Okay, that actually went way faster than I thought. Funny enough, Alastair was way easier to make than Thomas, probably ‘cause making spoiled rich assholes just comes too natural to me lol. Anyway, next up is Percival. As you can see, Alastair’s under a different tag than Thomas or Gideon, but that’s only ‘cause I’m still debating if I should also make his brother Edwin and their father Frank. I’ll probably let you guys decide that on my Telegram channel once I make up my mind, so feel free to hop in there. Besides, writing this series has honestly been such a joy for me, which wasn’t always the case in the past. As for why you end up marrying him, it’s all in Alastair’s background. Basically, your father lost his job, and Alastair saw the perfect chance to impress his own dad. Nothing romantic… at least not at first.

━━━━⊱OTHERS⊰━━━━

If you’re looking for more characters from this series, just click the #whitmorefamily hashtag or #ashworthfamily and you’ll see the rest of my bots from this storyline

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿CR
creator: visenyta
